description: A neuroimaging researcher needs the raw volumetric bone segmentation for analysis from the CT Cranium DICOM scan loaded in InVesalius 3. Create a bone segmentation mask using the 'Bone' threshold preset (226 to 3071 HU) and export the volumetric mask as a compressed NIfTI file to /home/ga/Documents/bone_mask.nii.gz. The export must be the mask volume itself rather than a 3D surface mesh.
